import nl.tsym.tackbox.report.Report;

// JV006 double-lane (D006): a capture and a notify on one path both reach the
// user lane; error/warn already show the user, so the notify double-shows.
class ReportDoubleLane {
    // Sequential capture + notify on one path.
    void bothOnOnePath() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (java.io.IOException e) { // want "JV006.*captures the caught and notifies"
            Report.warn("server unreachable", e, null, "net.fail");
            Report.notify("connection lost, retrying", e, null, "net.offline");
        }
    }

    // Exclusive if/else legs: notify on one, capture on the other - no double.
    void exclusiveLegsClean(boolean offline) {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (java.io.IOException e) {
            if (offline) {
                Report.notify("connection lost, retrying", e, null, "net.offline");
            } else {
                Report.warn("server unreachable", e, null, "net.fail");
            }
        }
    }

    // notify in one switch case, capture in the exclusive default case - no double.
    void switchExclusiveCasesClean(int code) {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (java.io.IOException e) {
            switch (code) {
                case 503:
                    Report.notify("connection lost, retrying", e, null, "net.offline");
                    break;
                default:
                    Report.warn("server unreachable", e, null, "net.fail");
            }
        }
    }

    // capture and notify in the SAME switch case run on one path - a double.
    void switchSameCaseFires(int code) {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (java.io.IOException e) { // want "JV006.*captures the caught and notifies"
            switch (code) {
                case 503:
                    Report.warn("server unreachable", e, null, "net.fail");
                    Report.notify("connection lost, retrying", e, null, "net.offline");
                    break;
                default:
                    break;
            }
        }
    }

    // notify inside a loop, capture after it - the loop body may run alongside.
    void loopNotifyThenCaptureFires(int[] items) {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (java.io.IOException e) { // want "JV006.*captures the caught and notifies"
            for (int x : items) {
                Report.notify("connection lost, retrying", e, null, "net.offline");
            }
            Report.warn("server unreachable", e, null, "net.fail");
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
